step_rationale: NLRP3 inflammasome component that releases IL-1β and IL-18; drives plaque inflammation and destabilization in atherosclerosis.
mechanism: Caspase-1 activates pro-inflammatory cytokines IL-1β and IL-18 via the NLRP3 inflammasome, promoting plaque inflammation and destabilization.
